variables.name: proxmox_tls_insecure
variables.description: Skip TLS verification for Proxmox API. Set false in production.

variables.name: proxmox_node
variables.description: Proxmox node name for VM placement.

variables.name: template_name
variables.description: Proxmox VM template to clone (Ubuntu cloud-init image).

variables.name: storage_pool
variables.description: Proxmox storage pool for VM disk.

variables.name: proxmox_vm_gateway
variables.description: Default gateway. Required when proxmox_vm_ip is not 'dhcp'.

variables.name: wg_server_public_key
variables.description: WireGuard server public key from the AWS-side template output.

variables.name: wg_server_endpoint
variables.description: WireGuard server endpoint (IP:port) from the AWS-side template output.

variables.name: wg_server_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP of the AWS server.

variables.name: wg_client_ip
variables.description: WireGuard tunnel IP for this Proxmox client.

variables.name: aws_vpc_cidr
variables.description: AWS VPC CIDR to route via WireGuard (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16). Leave empty for tunnel-only.
